features.name: base_plate
features.description: 3mm solid flat base providing stable print foundation and representing bin wall material below the pocket transition zone

features.name: display_cavity_section
features.description: 9mm cross-section of the 70x18mm display body cavity, representing parent z=62.2 to z=71.2. Rectangular pocket centered in bin XY footprint, open on the bottom face of the test piece

features.name: transition_ledge
features.description: L-shaped horizontal ledge at z=12.0 (parent z=71.2) where the 70x18mm display cavity narrows to the 18x7mm beam slot at the min-X, min-Y corner. The ledge is the resting surface for the caliper display body upper rim. Ledge area = (70x18) - (18x7) = 1134 mm2

features.name: beam_slot_zone
features.description: 18x7mm beam slot at the min-X, min-Y corner of the display cavity footprint, extending 12.8mm from the ledge to the top of the piece. This is the only open area above the ledge; the rest of the display cavity footprint is solid shoulder material

printOrientation.bed_face: 3mm base plate (bottom of test piece, z=0)
printOrientation.z_direction: matches parent bin Z axis (floor-to-top, caliper insertion axis)

specDeviations.reason: v2 uses full bin Y width (41.5mm) instead of v1 trimmed 25mm to properly show the L-shaped corner pocket geometry
Increased from v1 11.8mm because v2 display_cavity_z is 64mm (not 65mm), leaving more beam slot height in the parent
Full Y width (41.5mm vs 25mm) with tighter pocket cuts (less material removed) yields higher volume; spec.json updated to max 80 cm3
